top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.date = '2015-11-29' 
AND r.statusId IN (
    SELECT statusId 
    FROM status 
    WHERE status != 'Retired' AND status != 'Disqualified' AND status != 'Did not start' AND status != 'Did not qualify'
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.date = '2015-11-29' 
AND r.statusId NOT IN (SELECT statusId FROM status WHERE status = 'DNF' OR status = 'Disqualified' OR status = 'Retired' OR status = 'Accident' OR status = 'Engine' OR status = 'Gearbox' OR status = 'Transmission' OR status = 'Clutch' OR status = 'Hydraulics' OR status = 'Electrical' OR status = '+1 Lap' OR status = '+2 Laps' OR status = '+3 Laps' OR status = '+4 Laps' OR status = '+5 Laps' OR sta...

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE ra.date = '2015-11-29' 
AND s.status NOT IN ('DNF', 'Disqualified', 'Retired', 'Accident', 'Engine', 'Gearbox', 'Transmission', 'Clutch', 'Hydraulics', 'Electrical', '+1 Lap', '+2 Laps', '+3 Laps', '+4 Laps', '+5 Laps', '+6 Laps', '+7 Laps', '+8 Laps', '+9 Laps');

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.date = '2015-11-29' 
AND r.statusId IN (
    SELECT statusId 
    FROM status 
    WHERE status != 'Retired' AND status != 'Disqualified' AND status != 'Did not start' AND status != 'Did not qualify'
);
